ValidationRule.description: You need to change the Account Owner before approving the onboarding account
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName='Commercial', OR( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Status__c,'Approved'), ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Status__c,'Sending Approval') ), OR( Owner.Profile.Name = "System Administrator", Owner.Profile.Name = "uLab SysAdmin" ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You need to change the Account Owner before approving the onboarding account
